claim: UCB T cells reduce TCR diversity after transplantation.
evidence_sentences: After 6 months, cord blood-graft recipients approximated the TCR diversity of healthy individuals, whereas recipients of T cell-depleted peripheral-blood stem cell grafts had 28-fold and 14-fold lower CD4(+) and CD8(+) T cell diversities, respectively.

conditions: T cell-depleted peripheral-blood stem cell graft recipients
